percent_visits_rsv.long_name: Percentage of Emergency Department Visits for RSV
percent_visits_rsv.short_description: Percentage of ED visits with RSV-related diagnoses.
percent_visits_rsv.long_description: Percentage of emergency department visits that include RSV-related ICD-10 diagnosis codes, based on National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System data.

percent_visits_flu.long_name: Percentage of Emergency Department Visits for Influenza
percent_visits_flu.short_description: Percentage of ED visits with influenza-related diagnoses.
percent_visits_flu.long_description: Percentage of emergency department visits that include influenza-related ICD-10 diagnosis codes, based on National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System data.

percent_visits_covid.long_name: Percentage of Emergency Department Visits for COVID-19
percent_visits_covid.short_description: Percentage of ED visits with COVID-19-related diagnoses.
percent_visits_covid.long_description: Percentage of emergency department visits that include COVID-19-related ICD-10 diagnosis codes, based on National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System data.

nnds.name: National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS)
nnds.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nnds.description: The National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS) is a nationwide collaboration that enables all levels of public health to share notifiable disease related health information. Public health uses this information to monitor, control, and prevent the occurrence and spread of state-reportable and nationally notifiable infectious and some non-infectious diseases and conditions.
nnds.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
